message:
feat(tui): add 4-level TransparencyWidget for decision transparency (br-678k5, H.1)

DisclosureLevel enum (Badge/Summary/Detail/DeepDive) with next/prev cycling.
TransparencyWidget renders EvidenceLedgerEntry data at four disclosure levels:
L0 colored badges, L1 one-line summaries, L2 key-value detail, L3 sparkline.
Removes duplicate definition from concurrent agent work. All 5 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
